text:
Once upon a time in the quaint town of Willowbrook, there lived a curious owl named Oliver. He loved exploring mysterious places. One twilight afternoon, Oliver decided to visit Whispering Woods.

As he fluttered closer, whispers filled his ears. Oliver tilted his head. That was odd. Then he saw glimmers. It resembled moonlight but seemed softer.


He perched atop an ancient elm. That’s where he discovered the garden.

Every plant seemed to sing. Oliver saw petals talking softly.

He befriended one, delicate pink flower. It told stories.

One was about butterflies.

"They flutter. They come."

Oliver liked butterflies; they reminded him of dreams.

Next, he met vines. They spoke dreams.

"It intertwines. There's beauty."

Days passed. Oliver dreamed about rainbows trailing. One day, rainbows came.

He danced.

That’s when he saw her.

A dove gentle as night.

She knew owl songs. She fluttered beside him.

They flew
